reason: Bitcoin is showing strong momentum, rising to $69,000, driven by its perceived safe-haven status amidst geopolitical tensions (U.S.-Iran conflict) and a potential market bottom indicated by high stock market volatility. Institutional adoption news (Aon, Zcash funding) provides underlying support. However, high market volatility and BTC's proximity to previous all-time highs ($69k-$73k range) suggest significant resistance and potential for profit-taking, warranting close observation.
headlines: Bitcoin could be the big winner if the U.S.-Iran conflict drags on for months
Bitcoin rises to $69,000, stocks reverse big early losses, as crude oil sinks back below $100
Josh Swihart's Zcash Open Development Lab raises $25 million in seed funding
Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
Stock market volatility hits one-year high, possibly marking bitcoin bottom
